data.body: E3 COMPLETE — all 7 write/lifecycle commands in-process, 6 green commits: E5c relocate txn core (e6e645ae), transition/reopen + unblock port (41217cc7), claim (bf24646d), compact/compact-all + compact-on-close rewire (9f7bd246), scratch (46caa2cb), delete (7ddced5c). AC review: (1) rebar._commands.txn houses transition_core/claim_core, _engine/ticket_txn.py is a re-exiting shim ✓; (2) all 7 routed in rebar._cli, library transition/reopen/claim/compact rewired off _run (scratch/delete CLI-only) ✓; (3) newly_unblocked ported to rebar.graph._unblock, engine ticket-unblock.py shimmed ✓; (4) dual-run byte-parity tests green for every command incl. edge cases (test_e3_transition/claim/compact/scratch/delete) ✓; (5) golden-bytes guard test_e3_txn_bytes ✓; (6) concurrency matrix green post-relocation ✓; (7) dual-leg lock preserved, stiff-mop-lane closed ✓; (8) full suite 1694 passed at boundary, no module >800 LOC (transition.py 593), new modules all >100 LOC (ticket-unblock.py 96 is a transitional strangler shim, deleted in E7) ✓. NOTE for E7/E8: bash NOT deleted — dispatcher arms + ticket-*.sh + ticket_txn.py/ticket-unblock.py shims + ticket-delete-unlink-scan.py remain as the parity 2nd impl until the dispatcher + .sh suites retire together.
